topic: Cycling through Valencia exploring new places, parks, and neighborhoods — finding cool stuff along the way
location: Various — Sant Antoni, Jaime Roig, Ruta Corts

variants.rationale: Safe, proven multi-item ranking format. COUNTDOWN structure pairs naturally with ranking 3 items across 3 locations. REPORTERO persona delivers factual, measured commentary fitting a ranked tour. Medium-long duration. HIGH viral potential.

Short, punchy price-guessing format with VERY HIGH viral potential. MICRO structure keeps it tight and fast. ENERGETICO persona drives the fast-paced price reveal energy. Shortest variant for duration mix.

Minimal-narration format for variety — lets cycling footage and ambient sound carry the video. COLD OPEN structure opens with a striking visual before context. OBSERVADOR persona fits the calm, reflective discovery tone. HIGH viral potential with different engagement signal (visual-first, not voice-driven).
